# PostEngage.ai

> PostEngage is an Instagram automation platform that automates DMs, comment replies, and story responses using AI voice adaptation — and tracks its own ROI with before/after analytics.

## What PostEngage Does

PostEngage automates Instagram engagement:
- **Auto DM Responses**: AI-powered direct message replies that match your brand voice
- **Comment Automation**: Automatically respond to comments with contextual, personalized replies
- **Story Reply Automation**: Engage with story mentions and replies instantly
- **AI Voice Adaptation**: Learns your tone and writing style for authentic responses
- **ROI Dashboard**: Before vs after metrics showing follower growth, leads captured, and time saved
- **Post Scheduling**: Schedule and manage Instagram content
- **Lead Capture**: Convert engagement into leads with automated funnels
- **Analytics**: Deep insights into engagement, growth, and conversion metrics

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://postengage.ai
- Pricing: https://postengage.ai/pricing
- Features: https://postengage.ai/features
- Blog: https://postengage.ai/blog
- About: https://postengage.ai/about
- Contact: https://postengage.ai/contact

## Blog Topics

The PostEngage blog covers 350+ articles on:
- Instagram automation strategies and guides
- AI-powered engagement and DM automation
- Social media growth and analytics
- E-commerce and lead generation on Instagram
- Industry-specific Instagram strategies (SaaS, real estate, fitness, beauty, etc.)
- Content strategy and scheduling
- Compliance and best practices

## API & Integrations

PostEngage integrates with Instagram's official API and supports:
- Instagram Business and Creator accounts
- Webhook-based real-time engagement
- CRM and email marketing integrations
